extraction.one_line_summary: FUGLSANG Jakob won Stage 6 after ASTANA paced aggressively on Col de la Miserey, then ARU Fabio attacked 8km from summit but was caught by podium finishers who sprinted.
tactical_patterns: BARDET Roman initiated pace-lifting before classified climbs rather than waiting, forcing early selection and limiting late-race recovery options.
ARU Fabio attacked 8km from Miserey summit on 10% gradient but lacked teammates to discourage chasers after bridging alone.
ASTANA placed FUGLSANG Jakob to work early then kept him positioned to exploit sprint finish against stronger climbers.
VALVERDE Alejandro attacked early on Miserey but counterattack from ARU neutralized move, suggesting premature acceleration before steepest gradients.

rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: First WorldTour win in five years outside TTT suggests peak form timing before Tour, outsprinted climbers after pacing duties
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: Took yellow jersey and matched ARU/FROOME on decisive climb despite sprint loss, positioned well for remaining stages
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: neutral: Strong enough to bridge solo and drop initial attackers but unable to hold off fresh chasers on final approach
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Matched ARU acceleration and contested sprint finish, showing recovery from earlier Dauphiné weakness
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Initiated early pace then lost 50 seconds at finish, tactical aggression backfired without sustained climbing power
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Lost 1:06 after being distanced on Miserey, confirming declining climbing ability on sustained gradients
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: Early attack showed form but was immediately countered, suggesting insufficient power differential to create selection alone
